stemHtml: An electromagnetic wave consists of an oscillating electric (E) and an oscillating magnetic (H) field. Which of the following answers is true?

options.a: A dipole antenna is only capable to transmit the (H) field.
options.b: The (E) field and the (H) field are perpendicular to each other.
options.c: The (H) field is parallel to the wire and the (E) field is perpendicular to it.
options.d: When a constant current is sent through the antenna the (E) and (H) field are parallel.
